description: Detect Intel for Unix Revision 4 Delta
examples:
Command Example
!tn-get-question-metadata question-id=50477
Context Example
{
"Tanium.Question": {
"Expiration": "2019-11-27T14:16:24Z",
"ExpireSeconds": 0,
"ForceComputerIdFlag": false,
name: tn-get-question-metadata

outputs.description: The unique ID of the question object. Tanium.Question.Expiration Date
outputs.name: Tanium.Question.ID

outputs.description: Tanium.Question.ExpireSeconds The number of seconds before the question expires. Default is 600. Tanium.Question.ForceComputerIdFlag
outputs.name: The date the question expires.

outputs.description: Whether to force the question to be a counting question if only one selection is present. Default is not to force. If the question object is an instance of a saved question, this field is derived from the saved question Tanium.Question.IsExpired
outputs.name: Boolean

outputs.description: Whether the question has expired. Tanium.Question.QueryText The textual representation of the question.
outputs.name: Boolean

outputs.description: The ID of the saved question derived from this question. Tanium.Question.UserId The ID of the user who created / issued this question.
outputs.name: Tanium.Question.SavedQuestionId

outputs.description: The name of the user who created / issued this question.
outputs.name: Tanium.Question.UserName
